item.title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch-Systemtool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.description:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch-Systemtool
(Utilities)
i present my systemtool i created for arch it has many features
it combines alot of my apps into one
you will need qt6 installed

more coming soon
and some things are still being improved
this has been built from a long time of updating thats why the version is so high
originally this was bash

to run the application simply execute the run.sh
you can use these on my systems if you have installed one of my .isos
simply place files in cpp folder please my next update of .isos wont have this folder


v2.0.14
you can change theme
you can update
change mirrors
convert appimages
clear cache
create a backup with penguins eggs installed
lock unlock linux-zen kernel

[read more]

item.title: Inxi Gui [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Inxi Gui [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Inxi Gui
(Utilities)
Inxi gui shows system hardware, CPU, drivers, Xorg, Desktop, kernel, GCC version,
processes, RAM usage and more...
[read more]

item.content:encoded:
Inxi Gui
(Utilities)
Inxi gui shows system hardware, CPU, drivers, Xorg, Desktop, kernel, GCC version,
processes, RAM usage and more...
[read more]

item.title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.description:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]

item.title: FixVare PST to EML Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: FixVare PST to EML Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: fixvare
item.itunes:summary:
FixVare PST to EML Converter
(File Management)
FixVare PST to EML Conversion Software can easily change PST files from Microsoft Outlook to the EML file format. There is no need to install Outlook in order to convert the PST files to EML files. Users can easily convert many PST files to EML format, saving time and improving productivity. It guarantees 100% accurate conversion of PST data to EML files. The tool is easy to use on all versions of the Windows operating system. The programs fit Outlook versions 2003, 2007, 2010, 2013, 2016, 2019, 2019, and 2021. The tool is very advanced and can easily convert PST files to EML files. Users of Thunderbird, Outlook Express, Apple Mail, Windows Live Mail, and other email providers can access this PST file after complete conversion. The product is effective for both personal and business purposes. It provides a free trial edition of the tool for exploring the function of the application.

[read more]

FixVare PST to EML Converter

FixVare PST to EML Conversion Software can easily change PST files from Microsoft Outlook to the EML file format. There is no need to install Outlook in order to convert the PST files to EML files. Users can easily convert many PST files to EML format, saving time and improving productivity. It guarantees 100% accurate conversion of PST data to EML files. The tool is easy to use on all versions of the Windows operating system. The programs fit Outlook versions 2003, 2007, 2010, 2013, 2016, 2019, 2019, and 2021. The tool is very advanced and can easily convert PST files to EML files. Users of Thunderbird, Outlook Express, Apple Mail, Windows Live Mail, and other email providers can access this PST file after complete conversion. The product is effective for both personal and business purposes. It provides a free trial edition of the tool for exploring the function of the application.

[read more]

Users can easily convert many PST files to EML format, saving time and improving productivity. It guarantees 100% accurate conversion of PST data to EML files. The tool is easy to use on all versions of the Windows operating system. The programs fit Outlook versions 2003, 2007, 2010, 2013, 2016, 2019, 2019, and 2021. The tool is very advanced and can easily convert PST files to EML files. Users of Thunderbird, Outlook Express, Apple Mail, Windows Live Mail, and other email providers can access this PST file after complete conversion. The product is effective for both personal and business purposes. It provides a free trial edition of the tool for exploring the function of the application.

[read more]

item.title: Web SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Web SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: websmsoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Web SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
Powerful SMS messaging software provides interactive GUI for technical as well as non technical person that helps user to operate the software in easiest way. Website www.websmstomobile.org introduces Web SMS application that is useful when need to send emergency mass text message alerts regarding weather forecast, traffic delays, accident information from computer to national and international phone numbers.
[read more]

item.title: SIM Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SIM Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Use SIM recovery Software to regain lost SMS.SIM Card Data Recovery Software Retrieve accidentally erased phonebook numbers. Reliable SIM Card Data Recovery Software is easy to download from www.cellpdasim.com that provides advanced techniques for recovering misplaced contact numbers that deleted from phonebook. Easy to use data recovery program identifies last dialed and received numbers along with call duration. Innovative SIM Card Data Recovery Software is easy to download from www.cellpdasim.com that allows users to regain lost contact numbers even if sim card is blocked or undetectable. Brilliant SIM recovery software rescue files that erased due to virus/worm attack, software malfunctioning, corrupted sim cards or improper use of device. Want to get back accidentally erased SMS and text messages from virus infected sim cards? Download innovative SIM Card Data Recovery Software from website www.cellpdasim.com that enables users to retrieve accidentally lost documents.

[read more]

Brilliant SIM recovery software rescue files that erased due to virus/worm attack, software malfunctioning, corrupted sim cards or improper use of device. Want to get back accidentally erased SMS and text messages from virus infected sim cards? Download innovative SIM Card Data Recovery Software from website www.cellpdasim.com that enables users to retrieve accidentally lost documents.

[read more]

item.title: WholeClear PST to MBOX Converter [Email]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear PST to MBOX Converter [Email]
item.itunes:author: wholeclear
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear PST to MBOX Converter
(Email)
WholeClear PST to MBOX Converter Converts the Outlook files to MBOX format and keeps the data unchanged during and after the migration process. After scanning the PST file, this utility helps the user to view the preview of it. The outcome MBOX file can be opened in any of the MBOX supportive email clients like Thunderbird, AppleMail, Netscape, Spicebird, and all others. The feature of a user-friendly interface can be helpful to the professional as well as the novice users. This application can be operated with minimal expertise and little knowledge of computers.
Functions:
• It retains the original structure of files/folders through the conversion procedure.
• Suitable to every Microsoft Windows version.
• The privacy of the data is maintained during the migration process.
• It grants the free trial version to the users.
• PST files of any size can be converted using it
• PST files in both ANSI and UNICODE formats are compatible.
• The export process takes 3 to 4 steps to be done completely.
• It preserves the integrity of the file.
• The licensed version of the tool provides lifetime validity.
• It is a one-time investment.
• Cost-free upgrade.

Visit here: https://www.wholeclear.com/pst/mbox/
[read more]

item.title: Cell Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Cell Phone Data Recovery Tool revives videos. Cell Phone Data Recovery software retrieves lost and deleted important pictures. Click on company website www.cellpdasim.com and download free Cell Phone Data Recovery application is able to restore accidental deletion images, photos, videos songs, movies, photographs, pictures and more others. Do you want to retrieve deletion and formatted historical place photographs from mobile phone? Advance Cell Phone Data Recovery application is easily available at www.cellpdasim.com provides facility to salvage missing and lost wedding anniversaries or birthday party photographs and video clipping from corrupted mobile phone memory.How to restore formatted inbuilt memory of multimedia mobile phone valuable data? Professional Cell Phone Data Recovery software is simply downloaded from www.cellpdasim.com provides perfect option to revive deleted mobile phone data that saved all recovered files in file formats like AVI, RMVB, ASF, WMV, 3GP, PNG, GIF, TIF, BMP, PSD, APE, WMA, WAV FLAC or more others.

[read more]

item.title: Android Mobile Phone Bulk SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android Mobile Phone Bulk SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: websmsoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Android Mobile Phone Bulk SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
Easy to operate Android Mobile Phone Bulk SMS sending software allows users to deliver thousands of alert messages to targeted users within shortest time of span without being requiring professional or technical assistance. Reliable text messaging program is widely used to communicate over global mobile audience by sharing text sms from PC via Android supported phones at an affordable price.
[read more]

item.title: Bookkeeping Software [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Bookkeeping Software [Financial]
item.itunes:author: employeesalarysoft
item.itunes:summary:
Bookkeeping Software
(Financial)
Bookkeeping Software provides automate solution to maintain day to day stock, item, accounts, sales-purchase, balance sheet, production and other business transaction reports in computerized manner. Accounts management program provides barcode feature to data entry in accurate and efficient way with minimized errors. Advance business organizer program provides facility to keep database safe for future use using data backup and restore feature.

[read more]

Bookkeeping Software provides automate solution to maintain day to day stock, item, accounts, sales-purchase, balance sheet, production and other business transaction reports in computerized manner. Accounts management program provides barcode feature to data entry in accurate and efficient way with minimized errors. Advance business organizer program provides facility to keep database safe for future use using data backup and restore feature.

[read more]

Bookkeeping Software
(Financial)
Bookkeeping Software provides automate solution to maintain day to day stock, item, accounts, sales-purchase, balance sheet, production and other business transaction reports in computerized manner. Accounts management program provides barcode feature to data entry in accurate and efficient way with minimized errors. Advance business organizer program provides facility to keep database safe for future use using data backup and restore feature.
